functional_purpose: Receives DICOM studies and submits a dicom_request to OpenEyes PayloadProcessor. Zeiss IOLMaster objects with supported SOP classes are also written to the IOLMasterImport incoming folder.
business_process: Imaging and biometry acquisition for clinical record ingestion.

destination_connectors.name: Write out file to IolMasterImport incoming folder when device is a Zeiss IOLMaster

ack_behaviour: Auto-generates the DICOM response after the source transformer and responds after processing.
main_filters: Source transformer removes the IOLMaster file destination unless manufacturer is Zeiss, model contains iolmaster, and SOP class is supported
main_transformer_stages: Extract patient, study, device, SOP class, and AE title tags
Derive identifier_type and institution_id from local AE title with configurationMap default
Set source_platform from AE titles
Submit dicom_request with DICOM content to PayloadProcessor
error_handling: No explicit error handler; destinations have response validation disabled.
retry_behaviour: Both destinations specify retry interval 10000 ms and retry count 0.
queue_behaviour: Destination queueing is disabled for both destinations.

evidence.claim: Portsmouth DICOM listens on DICOM port 11112 and posts dicom_request messages to PayloadProcessor.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/DICOM.xml sourceConnector listener properties lines 10-18; PayloadProcessor API Send properties lines 355-430

evidence.claim: The source transformer reads configurationMap:defaultPatientIdentifierType and conditionally removes the IOLMaster file destination based on device and SOP-class metadata.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/DICOM.xml source transformer steps Extract identifier_type and institution_id from Local AET lines 204-227 and Remove the IOLMaster Import destination lines 253-274

evidence.claim: The IOLMaster file destination is /mnt/dicom and uses a File Writer.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/DICOM.xml destination Write out file to IolMasterImport incoming folder lines 288-348

functional_purpose: Receives HL7 ADT messages over MLLP and updates OpenEyes PASAPI V2 patients, appointments, and patient merges. Event filters select the appropriate PASAPI operation.
business_process: Synchronisation of PAS patient demographics, appointments, attendance status, and patient merges into OpenEyes.
ack_behaviour: Auto-generates HL7 AA, AE, or AR before processing; source configuration has respondAfterProcessing false.
main_filters: Appointment PUT accepts A01, A05, A08, A11, A03, A13, A02, and A12 except cancelled A08
main_transformer_stages: Build patient XML and map hospital number, visit, clinic, doctor, status, NHS number, and admit source
PUT patient records
PUT or DELETE appointments based on event filters
PUT patient merge records
error_handling: Mapping scripts catch conversion errors and log them; patient response transformer checks warnings.
retry_behaviour: All HTTP destinations specify retry interval 10000 ms and retry count 0.
logging: Mapping scripts log errors and one doctor-code step logs an HL7 field at debug level, creating a PII-in-log risk.

evidence.claim: Portsmouth PAS IN V2 is an HL7v2 MLLP TCP Listener on port 6661 with generated AA/AE/AR acknowledgements before processing.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/PAS IN V2.xml sourceConnector properties and HL7 response generation lines 10-142

evidence.claim: Its HTTP destinations PUT to PASAPI/V2 Patient, PatientAppointment, and PatientMerge endpoints using HTTP Basic authentication.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/PAS IN V2.xml destination properties PASAPI - Patient lines 687-1221, Clinic List PUT/DELETE lines 1226-1751, PASAPI - Patient Merge lines 1756-1997

evidence.claim: Appointment and merge event handling is selected by explicit ADT-event filters.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/PAS IN V2.xml Appointment Filter lines 1480-1506; Clinic List DELETE filter lines 1733-1748; Patient Merge filter lines 1981-1994

functional_purpose: Accepts an HTTP patient identifier query, transforms it to an HL7 QBP^Q21 request, sends it to a remote PAS over MLLP, converts the response to XML, and returns it to the HTTP caller.
business_process: On-demand retrieval of patient demographics from the remote PAS.
ack_behaviour: HTTP source waits for post-processing response d6; remote MLLP destination validates HL7 responses with a 60000 ms timeout.
main_filters: Send Q21 requires non-empty QPD-3 search value
Convert K21 to XML runs only when Send Q21 status is SENT
Create response runs when Send Q21 status is blank
Disabled final response error branch applies when Send Q21 is not SENT
main_transformer_stages: Read hosnum or nhsnum HTTP parameter into QPD-3
Generate QBP^Q21 message identifiers and timestamp
Send Q21 to remote PAS
Convert K21 response to XML
Return transformed response to HTTP caller
error_handling: A final non-SENT response branch exists but is disabled; remote response validation is enabled.
retry_behaviour: All destinations specify retry interval 10000 ms and retry count 0; MLLP maxRetries is 2.
queue_behaviour: Destination queueing is disabled; remote response timeout does not queue.
logging: Source transformer logs request Parameters, creating a PII-in-log risk.

evidence.claim: Portsmouth PAS OUT is an unauthenticated HTTP Listener on port 6663 that transforms XML input to HL7v2 and responds after processing through response variable d6.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/PAS OUT.xml sourceConnector properties and transformer lines 10-141

evidence.claim: Send Q21 is an MLLP TCP Sender to 192.168.27.203:30029, validates the response, and filters out empty QPD-3 values.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/PAS OUT.xml Send Q21 properties lines 149-385

evidence.claim: Subsequent JavaScript destinations convert the K21 response to XML and return TransformedResponse, while the non-SENT response branch is disabled.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/PAS OUT.xml Convert K21 to XML lines 390-528; Create response lines 533-869; Respond lines 874-1108

functional_purpose: Polls the GenericDropToOpenEyes SFTP folder, validates an eight-part filename, searches OpenEyes for the patient, and submits the file as a document_upload_request to PayloadProcessor.
business_process: Ingestion of general clinical documents delivered by file drop.
main_filters: Accept only filenames with eight double-underscore-separated parts
main_transformer_stages: Split filename into patient identifier, patient id, firm, subtype, laterality, reference, date, and document filename
Map MIME type from file extension
Submit binary document data with request_type document_upload_request
error_handling: Invalid filename sets a channelMap error_message and filters the message; File Reader moves processed files and has an error move directory.
retry_behaviour: Disabled Patient Search has five retries; enabled PayloadProcessor destination has three retries at 10000 ms.

evidence.claim: Portsmouth General Documents IN uses a File Reader on the GenericDropToOpenEyes SFTP location, moves processed files, and filters for an eight-part filename.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/General Documents IN.xml sourceConnector properties lines 10-90; File Format source filter lines 228-241

evidence.claim: It has a disabled Patient Search GET connector and an enabled PayloadProcessor HTTP connector posting document_upload_request data with Basic authentication.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/General Documents IN.xml destinations Patient Search lines 250-375 and PayloadProcessor API Send lines 380-535

functional_purpose: Polls the IOLSelectionToOpenEyes SFTP folder, validates an eight-part filename, and submits the file as a document_upload_request to PayloadProcessor. A configured Patient Search connector is disabled.
business_process: Ingestion of IOL selection documents delivered by file drop.
main_filters: Accept only filenames with eight double-underscore-separated parts
main_transformer_stages: Split filename into document metadata fields
Map MIME type from extension
Submit binary data as document_upload_request
error_handling: Invalid filename sets a channelMap error_message and filters the message; File Reader moves processed files and has an error move directory.
retry_behaviour: Disabled Patient Search has five retries; enabled PayloadProcessor destination has three retries at 10000 ms.

evidence.claim: Portsmouth IOL Documents IN uses a File Reader on the IOLSelectionToOpenEyes SFTP location and applies the eight-part File Format filter.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/IOL Documents IN.xml sourceConnector properties lines 10-90; File Format source filter lines 228-241

evidence.claim: It configures a disabled Patient Search endpoint and an enabled Basic-authenticated PayloadProcessor document_upload_request endpoint.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/IOL Documents IN.xml destinations Patient Search lines 250-375 and PayloadProcessor API Send lines 380-535

functional_purpose: Polls the migration SFTP folder, validates an eight-part filename, looks up the patient through OpenEyes Patient/Search, and submits the binary file as a document_upload_request to PayloadProcessor.
business_process: Migration of historical clinical documents into OpenEyes.
main_filters: Accept only filenames with eight double-underscore-separated parts
main_transformer_stages: Split filename into document metadata fields
Map MIME type from extension
POST patient search term and identifier type
Submit binary data as document_upload_request
error_handling: Invalid filename sets a channelMap error_message and filters the message; File Reader moves processed files and has an error move directory.
retry_behaviour: Both destinations specify retry interval 10000 ms and retry count 0.

evidence.claim: Portsmouth Migration Documents IN reads the Additional Files/hicss/pdf SFTP path, moves processed files, and requires an eight-part filename.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/Migration Documents IN.xml sourceConnector properties lines 10-90; File Format filter lines 228-241

evidence.claim: It POSTs to /api/v1/Patient/Search and then submits document_upload_request data to PayloadProcessor, with Basic authentication configured on both HTTP destinations.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/Migration Documents IN.xml PatientSearch properties lines 250-357 and PayloadProcessor API Send properties lines 358-520

functional_purpose: Reads files from the docman drop folder and writes them to the CorrespondenceToPrint remote file location.
main_transformer_stages: Pass encoded file data unchanged to the file writer
retry_behaviour: Retry interval 10000 ms and retry count 0.

evidence.claim: Portsmouth DOCUMENT-OUT-Drop reads /mnt/docman/drop-folder with File Reader and writes ${message.encodedData} to CorrespondenceToPrint with File Writer.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/DOCUMENT-OUT-Drop.xml sourceConnector properties lines 10-104; Destination 1 properties lines 110-200

functional_purpose: Reads files from the minestrone document folder and writes them to the remote TIE file location.
business_process: Outbound correspondence delivery to the TIE file share.
main_transformer_stages: Pass encoded file data unchanged to the file writer
retry_behaviour: Retry interval 10000 ms and retry count 0.

evidence.claim: Portsmouth DOCUMENT-OUT-Minestrone reads /mnt/docman/minestrone with File Reader and writes ${message.encodedData} to TIE with File Writer.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/DOCUMENT-OUT-Minestrone.xml sourceConnector properties lines 10-104; Destination 1 properties lines 110-200

functional_purpose: Receives HL7 document messages over MLLP, extracts document metadata and content from PID, TXA, and OBX fields, and submits a document upload request to PayloadProcessor.
business_process: Clinical document ingestion from an HL7 sender.
ack_behaviour: Auto-generates HL7 AA, AE, or AR before processing; source configuration has respondAfterProcessing false.
main_transformer_stages: Extract PT patient identifier from PID-3
Map TXA document date, reference, and filename
Map OBX subtype, laterality, firm, and document payload
Infer MIME type from filename extension
POST binary document data as a document_upload_request
error_handling: Patient identifier extraction catches exceptions, logs an error, and uses an empty value.
retry_behaviour: Retry interval 10000 ms and retry count 0.
logging: Logs patient identifier extraction errors; potential identifier exposure in error text.

evidence.claim: Portsmouth DOCUMENTS IN HL7 is an MLLP TCP Listener on port 6662 with HL7v2 data and generated AA/AE/AR acknowledgements before processing.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/DOCUMENTS IN HL7.xml sourceConnector properties and HL7 response generation lines 10-142

evidence.claim: Its Send Document connector posts document data to /api/v1/request/queue/add using HTTP Basic authentication.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/DOCUMENTS IN HL7.xml destination Send Document properties lines 148-260

evidence.claim: The destination transformer extracts PID, TXA, and OBX data and derives MIME type from Filename.
evidence.location: Portsmouth/DOCUMENTS IN HL7.xml Send Document transformer steps PatientId through MimeType lines 263-397
